---
title: "Contact"
description-meta: "Contact Information"
image: "files/images/basic/headshot1.jpg"
title-block-banner: false
<!-- page-navigation: false -->
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 85%
  links:
    - icon: globe
      text: Uprofile
      href: https://ess.uw.edu/people/liam-kirkpatrick/
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:liamkp@uw.com    
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/liam-r-kirkpatrick/
      target: _blank
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/kirkpatrick.liam/
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed, you also need to install the fontawesome extension
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6476-5331
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ldlw-aEAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao
      target: _blank
#    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate"
#      href: https://www.researchgate.net
#      target: _blank

---

:::{#hero-heading}

Questions about my research, fieldwork, or anything else? 

You can reach me at my [email](liamkp@uw.edu). 

I look forward to hearing from you!

:::
